mapper.select: select count(1) from t_comment_like where comment_id = #{commentId} and user_id = #{userId}
select user_id from t_comment_like where comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_comment_like (id, user_id, comment_id, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{commentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_comment_like
id,
user_id,
comment_id,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{commentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

insert into t_comment_like (user_id, comment_id, create_time) values
(#{item.userId}, #{item.commentId}, #{item.createTime})
on duplicate key update id = id
mapper.update:
update t_comment_like
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
comment_id = #{commentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
